2. Validation commands run and outcomes

Required:
`UV_CACHE_DIR=.cache/uv UV_PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT=/Users/tony/Code/helaicopter/.venv UV_NO_SYNC=1 PYTHONPATH=python uv run --active pytest -q tests/test_cli_runtime.py tests/test_api_orchestration.py`
Passed: `14 passed in 13.53s`

`npm_config_cache=.cache/npm npm run lint`
Passed

Additional targeted verification:
`PYTHONPATH=python /Users/tony/Code/helaicopter/.venv/bin/python -m pytest -q tests/test_api_database.py tests/test_backend_settings.py tests/test_api_prefect_orchestration.py`
Passed: `18 passed in 0.92s`

`PYTHONPATH=python /Users/tony/Code/helaicopter/.venv/bin/python -m pytest -q tests/test_backend_type_system_rollout.py`
Passed: `12 passed in 0.30s`

`node --import tsx --test src/lib/client/normalize.test.ts src/lib/client/mutations.test.ts`
Passed: `14/14`

3. Remaining risks or follow-ups

The rename is transitional on purpose: new payloads now emit `duckdb`/`inspection`, but the backend parser, frontend normalizer, and `Settings.legacy_duckdb` alias still accept old callers and persisted `legacyDuckdb` data. Once external callers and stored status files are fully migrated, those compatibility aliases can be removed in a follow-up.
